title: papaver gracile
intro: Papaver gracile, also known as the small poppy or California poppy, is a delicate annual plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae) and is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate stress. The health benefits of Papaver gracile include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
